raw_source.title: Remote Roles Are Open at EkvahLabs
raw_source.body:
**We’re Hiring: Chief Technology Officer (CTO) / Technical Team Lead**

**Ekvahlabs | Remote / Flexible**

**Ekvahlabs** is looking for an experienced and visionary CTO / Technical Team Lead to lead our engineering strategy, build scalable technology solutions, and guide our development team toward creating impactful products.

As a key technology leader, you will work closely with founders and cross-functional teams to define technical direction, architect solutions, and establish engineering best practices.


 - Responsibilities
• Define and execute the company’s technology roadmap and engineering strategy
• Lead, mentor, and grow a high-performing development team
• Design scalable, secure, and maintainable software architectures
• Make critical technology decisions across platforms, infrastructure, and development processes
• Drive product development from concept to deployment
• Establish coding standards, development workflows, and quality practices
• Collaborate with product, business, and design teams to deliver innovative solutions

 - Requirements
• 5+ years of software engineering experience with strong technical leadership skills
• Proven experience as a Tech Lead, Engineering Manager, CTO, or similar role
• Strong knowledge of modern web technologies, cloud infrastructure, and software architecture
• Experience building and scaling production-level applications
• Ability to make strategic technical decisions while remaining hands-on when needed
• Strong communication, problem-solving, and team leadership skills

 - Preferred Experience
• Startup or early-stage company experience
• Experience leading remote engineering teams
• Experience with AI, Web3, SaaS, fintech, or emerging technologies is a plus

 - What We Offer
• Opportunity to shape the technology vision of a growing company
• High ownership and impact role
• Collaborative and innovative environment
• Flexible working conditions
• Potential leadership growth opportunities

 - Compensation Structure
 $400,000 – $450,000 / year
 20% cryptocurrency + 80% credit / cash

If you are passionate about technology, leadership, and building the future with a talented team, we would love to hear from you.

Apply now or send us your profile/message to start the conversation.
Company Site: https://ekvahlabs.com
Email: hello@ekvahlabs.com
Telegram: @marymoloku
